EmailSent.title: Email sent
EmailSent.message: We have sent a link to confirm your email to {email}

PasswordRecovery.description: Enter your email address and we will send you further instructions
PasswordRecovery.successMessage: The link has been sent by email. If you don't receive an email, send the link again.
PasswordRecovery.error: An error occurred while sending the request. Please try again.
PasswordRecovery.passwordDescription: Your password must be between 6 and 20 characters

LinkExpired.title: Email verification link expired!
LinkExpired.description: Looks like the verification link has expired. Not to worry, we can send the link again

ServerErrors.usernameExists: User with this username is already registered
ServerErrors.emailExists: User with this email is already registered
ServerErrors.emailAlreadyConfirmed: User with this email already confirmed
ServerErrors.emailNotFound: User with this email not found
ServerErrors.emailNotRegistered: It is impossible to send the code - the specified email is not registered

username.pattern: Username can only contain 0-9, A-Z, a-z, _, -

email.invalid: The email must match the format example@example.com
email.disposable: Temporary email addresses are not allowed

password.required: Password must contain at least one number, one uppercase letter and one lowercase letter

terms.required: You must agree to the Terms of Service

recaptcha.expired: reCAPTCHA verification has expired. Please complete the verification again
